segments.text: Namaste, Saraswati Devi, Gauravani Pracharane, Nirvishesha, Shunjavadi, Paschati, Deshtharane.
Jai Shri Krishna Chaitanya Prabhu Nityananda, Shri Advaita Gadhadara, Shiva Sadhi, Gauravakta Vinda,
Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare, Hare Rama, Hare Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare.
Welcome all of you.
We'll continue yesterday's, the same, that matter which I had projected, some modifications I made,
that we'll just go through once again, in a short time, and then we'll take a lot of questions I have received on this.
So I'll try to answer those things. So please project there.
So, basically, the whole exercise is, how to fill our intelligence, fill our mind,
fill our senses, body, with transcendental happiness.

of...

Good, healthy body, strong body, is a pleasure.
So, with respect to body, we discussed how we can transcendently relate with the body.
We can transcendently relate by feeling that I am not this body.
Krishna is a maintainer of my body and life.
